European Commission Publishes Guidelines on AI Act Classification

15 January 2024
The European Commission has published new guidelines to help organizations classify their AI systems under the EU AI Act...

Article 5 Prohibited AI Practices - Clarification

10 January 2024
Further clarification on the prohibited AI practices under Article 5 of the AI Act, including social scoring and real-time biometric identification...

High-Risk AI Systems: Annex III Updates

05 January 2024
Updates to Annex III of the AI Act expand the list of high-risk AI systems to include new categories...
